$comment: Slot config for Alliance Cobrinha Clark social automation. Read by produce-post and daily-check skills. Hybrid operating mode — Mon-Thu use registered-master from 'For Clark V2' (DAHJC_QKr0U), Fri-Sun use fresh-generate with prompts tightened to match the observed editorial aesthetic.
operating_mode_notes: Per-slot 'mode' field is authoritative. 'registered-master' duplicates a specific page of a master design and edits the photo + text overlay in place. 'fresh-generate' calls Canva generate-design with the brand kit + slot's generation_prompt. Master templates are 'For Clark V2' (DAHJC_QKr0U) pages 1-4, used as the cover-page layout for Mon-Thu carousel content per Clark's published pattern (May 2026).

canva.$comment_brand_kit: kAGdeHDeWjQ is the unnamed brand kit in this Canva account — same kit as the LA build. Whether its actual tokens match Clark's documentation (gold + black + Helvetica) or LA's (black + tan + serif) will be confirmed after the first produce-post run. If misaligned, see brand/README.md for fix options.
canva.$comment_folder: Reusing the existing 'Alliance Clark' folder rather than creating a new 'Alliance Cobrinha Clark' folder — keeps all Alliance Clark content in one place. Cached after first successful produce-post run (W19 · 05-fri-community).

drive.$comment: Skills should match Drive folders by exact name (case + punctuation). If a search returns nothing, surface the missing folder name to the user, don't guess.

theme_signature.$comment: Replaces the brand-kit-documentation aesthetic (gold + black + serif) with what's actually being published. The team's real visual system is editorial / documentary: photo IS the design, graphic elements are minimal whispers. Reference: For Clark V2 (DAHJC_QKr0U) page 4, published as the THU 2026-05-07 kids/family cover. The brand kit doc described intent; this section describes practice. Practice supersedes.
theme_signature.background: The photograph IS the background. Full-bleed, edge-to-edge. No black panels, no slate cards, no decorative shapes.
theme_signature.signature_color: None graphic. Color comes from the photograph. The brand kit's gold #FED52E is documented intent but does not appear in published work.
theme_signature.decorative_motifs: None. No rule lines, no underlines, no frames, no shape masks. The composition of the photo provides all visual structure.
theme_signature.headline_treatment: White, sans-serif (Helvetica or similar), uppercase, stacked, tight line-height, bottom-right corner. Each line is one or two words. Three lines max. Right-aligned. NO BOX, NO BACKGROUND PANEL — text sits directly on photo.
theme_signature.subheadline_treatment: Treated identically to headline; visual hierarchy comes from line breaks and word count, not size variance. Last line may be slightly larger if it's the key phrase.
theme_signature.photo_placement: Full-bleed. Photo occupies 100% of the 1080x1350 canvas. Composition must leave clean negative space (typically lower-right or lower-left) for text overlay.
theme_signature.typography_hierarchy: Single sans-serif voice. No subhead/body distinction. Stacked single words or short phrases.
theme_signature.logo_placement: No graphic logo added in design. Brand presence comes from the gym wall wordmark visible in the photograph itself, OR from the post's account handle (visible in IG UI, not the design).
theme_signature.tone_overall: Editorial / documentary. Magnum Photos + restrained athletic brand. Anti-design — looks unposed, raw, real. The opposite of typical gym Instagram.
what_to_avoid: Black background frames around the photo
Serif headline fonts (the auto-apply Canva brand kit produces these — must override)
Large logos added to the design
Generic motivational headlines (Train. Laugh. Grow., Crush It, etc.) — use approved candidates from brand/caption-pool.json

slots.name: Set the Tone
slots.goal: Consistency + presence — start the week strong

master_template.purpose: Monday carousel cover — published pattern as of W19 2026

produce_post_steps: Duplicate the master design DAHJC_QKr0U into a new working design (use Canva's available duplicate/import path).
Keep only page 1; remove pages 2-4 from the working copy.
Open editing transaction on the working design.
Replace the hero photo element on page 1 with the newly-uploaded asset from Drive.
Replace the text overlay with a Monday community_daily caption (see brand/caption-pool.json examples). Keep the same typography and position as the master; only swap the words.
Commit the editing transaction. Move into Alliance Clark folder. Report draft URL.
slots.fallback_if_master_fails: If the editing transaction can't open or photo/text replacement isn't supported by available tools, fall back to fresh-generate using the prompt below — but ALSO surface the failure to the user so we can fix the master path.
slots.fresh_generate_fallback_prompt: Instagram post, 1080x1350 (4:5 portrait). FULL-BLEED PHOTO covering the entire canvas — no black borders, no frames, no shape masks. Hero photo: students arriving for class, coach greeting, mat being prepared. Text overlay BOTTOM-RIGHT: stacked uppercase white sans-serif, 1-3 short lines max (e.g. 'MONDAY' / 'THE MAT IS OPEN'). NO graphic logo, NO gold elements, NO serif fonts. Editorial / documentary aesthetic — photo is the design.

slots.name: Member Story
slots.goal: Relatability → conversion. Converts better than ads.

master_template.purpose: Tuesday carousel cover — published pattern as of W19 2026 ('Your Mat. Your People. Your Home in Clark.' tone)

produce_post_steps: Duplicate the master design DAHJC_QKr0U into a new working design.
Keep only page 2; remove pages 1, 3, 4 from the working copy.
Open editing transaction.
Replace the hero photo element with the featured member's portrait/candid shot from Drive.
Replace the text overlay with the featured member's quote (see brief.md for the specific member + quote, or pull from caption-library member_spotlight pillar).
Commit. Move to Alliance Clark folder. Report draft URL.
slots.fallback_if_master_fails: Fall back to fresh-generate with the prompt below; surface failure.
slots.fresh_generate_fallback_prompt: Instagram post, 1080x1350 (4:5 portrait). FULL-BLEED PHOTO covering entire canvas — no frames. Hero: portrait or candid of the featured student. Text overlay BOTTOM-RIGHT: stacked uppercase white sans-serif, 2-3 short lines containing the member's quote (e.g. 'STARTED WITH' / 'ZERO EXPERIENCE' / 'STILL HERE THREE MONTHS LATER'). NO logo, NO gold, NO serif fonts. Editorial documentary aesthetic.

slots.name: Value / Trust
slots.goal: Authority without intimidation. Educational, calm, accessible.

master_template.purpose: Wednesday carousel cover — published pattern as of W19 2026 (Santi quote was the W19 example)

produce_post_steps: Duplicate the master design DAHJC_QKr0U into a new working design.
Keep only page 3; remove other pages from the working copy.
Open editing transaction.
Replace the hero photo element with a coach-student moment from Drive (Coach-Student subfolder).
Replace the text overlay with the value/trust message — either a kid quote like the Santi example, or an educational hook ('Why fundamentals matter', 'What every white belt should know').
Commit. Move to Alliance Clark folder. Report draft URL.
slots.fallback_if_master_fails: Fall back to fresh-generate with the prompt below; surface failure.
slots.fresh_generate_fallback_prompt: Instagram post, 1080x1350 (4:5 portrait). FULL-BLEED PHOTO covering entire canvas. Hero: coach-student moment, technique demo, or learning interaction. Text overlay BOTTOM-RIGHT: stacked uppercase white sans-serif, 2-3 short lines containing either an educational hook ('WHY FUNDAMENTALS MATTER') or a member quote about learning ('I LEARNED TO BE RESPECTFUL — SANTI'). NO logo, NO gold, NO serif fonts. Editorial documentary aesthetic.
slots.$comment_format_change: Changed from instagram_reel_9_16 to instagram_post_4_5 to match the published WED pattern (carousel cover, not reel). If the team wants a reel for WED instead, change format back and omit the master template — there's no reel master in For Clark V2.

slots.name: Kids / Family
slots.goal: Parent conversion (CRITICAL). 50% of roster is kids 6–12; their parents are watching from the sideline.

master_template.purpose: Thursday carousel cover — the canonical reference. Published THU 2026-05-07 with 'Confidence / Listening / Safe Place to Learn' overlay on a kids-circle-with-coach photo.

produce_post_steps: Duplicate the master design DAHJC_QKr0U into a new working design.
Keep only page 4; remove other pages from the working copy.
Open editing transaction.
Replace the hero photo element with the newest kids/family asset from Drive (Kids & Family subfolder). Photo must show kids focused/listening/learning — NOT sparring, NOT mid-throw.

Replace the text overlay (default: 'CONFIDENCE / LISTENING / SAFE PLACE TO LEARN'). Other approved overlays: 'DISCIPLINE / FOCUS / SHOWS UP', 'WHAT 45 MINUTES BUILDS / IN A KID', 'PARENTS / THIS IS THEM / AFTER CLASS'. Always parent-facing.
Commit. Move to Alliance Clark folder. Report draft URL.
slots.fallback_if_master_fails: Fall back to fresh-generate with the prompt below; surface failure.
slots.fresh_generate_fallback_prompt: Instagram post, 1080x1350 (4:5 portrait). FULL-BLEED PHOTO covering entire canvas. PARENT IS THE READER. Hero: kids in class, focused/listening/engaged — NOT sparring, NOT mid-throw. Show what a parent wants to see. Text overlay BOTTOM-RIGHT: stacked uppercase white sans-serif, 3 short lines (e.g. 'CONFIDENCE / LISTENING / SAFE PLACE TO LEARN'). NO logo, NO gold, NO serif fonts. Editorial documentary aesthetic.

slots.name: Community
slots.goal: Belonging. End-of-week vibe, looser than Monday.

master_template.purpose: Friday Community cover/post — added 2026-05-08. Centered horizontal text overlay 'TRAIN • GROW • LAUGH' in dark sans-serif on light mat below the action photo. Editorial composition, full canvas photo with negative-space text band at the bottom.
approved_alternative_overlays: WE TRAIN HARD • WE ENJOY THE PROCESS

produce_post_steps: Duplicate the master design DAHJC_QKr0U into a new working design.
Keep only page 5; remove pages 1-4 from the working copy.
Open editing transaction.
Replace the hero photo element on page 5 with the newest Community asset from Drive. Photo should be action / candid / community moment — rolling, laughing, post-class warmth.
Replace the text overlay (default: 'TRAIN • GROW • LAUGH'). Operator can override to one of the approved alternatives via brief.md if a different Friday tone fits the week.
Commit. Move to Alliance Clark folder. Report draft URL.
slots.fallback_if_master_fails: Fall back to fresh-generate with the prompt below; surface failure.
slots.fresh_generate_fallback_prompt: Instagram post, 1080x1350 (4:5 portrait). Full-canvas photo with action-or-community moment dominating the upper 70%. Below the action, a clean light-grey mat or neutral surface that holds a horizontal centered text band. Text overlay (centered, bottom-third): uppercase dark sans-serif (Helvetica or similar), single line, separated by bullet dots — e.g. 'TRAIN • GROW • LAUGH'. NO black frames. NO gold. NO serif fonts. NO graphic logo. Editorial / documentary aesthetic.

slots.name: Social Proof
slots.goal: FOMO. Show the room is full. Quietly confident.
slots.$comment_no_master: No master in For Clark V2 for SAT. Fresh-generate with editorial aesthetic locked.
slots.generation_prompt: Instagram post, 1080x1350 (4:5 portrait). FULL-BLEED PHOTO covering entire canvas. Hero photo: full-room shot — group photo after class, packed open mat, team lineup. Image must communicate SCALE (many people, full mat, the room is alive). Text overlay BOTTOM-RIGHT or BOTTOM-CENTER: stacked uppercase white sans-serif, 1-3 short lines. Approved phrases: 'WEEKEND TRAINING / WITH THE TEAM', 'BUILT / TOGETHER', '42 OF US / AND COUNTING', 'SATURDAY / OPEN MAT'. NO scarcity language ('limited slots', 'don't miss out'). NO graphic logo. NO gold. NO serif fonts. NO @handle. Editorial / documentary aesthetic. Quietly confident — let the photo carry the message.

slots.name: Leader Voice
slots.goal: Trust + leadership. Close the week with intention.
slots.$comment_no_master: No SUN-specific master in For Clark V2 (only Mon-Thu have masters). Fresh-generate with editorial aesthetic. Format kept as 1080x1350 4:5 to match the rest of the week's feed; if the team prefers reel format for SUN, swap dimensions and remove the master template requirement (none exists for vertical reel anyway).
slots.generation_prompt: Instagram post, 1080x1350 (4:5 portrait). FULL-BLEED PHOTO covering entire canvas. Hero photo or video still: professor walking the mat, wide shot of the room mid-class, end-of-class circle. Reflective end-of-week energy. Text overlay BOTTOM-RIGHT or BOTTOM-LEFT: stacked uppercase white sans-serif, 2-4 short lines. Approved phrases: 'WHAT WE'RE / BUILDING', 'BUILT TOGETHER / ONE MAT / ONE TEAM', 'THE REASON / WE KEEP / SHOWING UP', 'YOUR MAT / YOUR PEOPLE / YOUR HOME / IN CLARK' (matches Page 2 of For Clark V2 text). NO graphic logo. NO gold. NO serif fonts. NO @handle. Editorial / documentary aesthetic. Reflective, leadership voice — the academy speaking to its community.
